title: Diamond Scheduler
author: bstrana
description: Sports league scheduling app with a drag-and-drop calendar, playoff brackets, live score entry links, and iCal subscription feeds.

changelog.1.0.0: Initial Cloudron community release with embedded PocketBase and multi-tenant support.
changelog.1.0.1: Fix: add image URL and updateUrl to manifest so Cloudron update checks resolve correctly.
changelog.1.0.2: Fix: team logos now render (CSP allows https: images); schedule publishing now works (env var defaults guaranteed in start.sh).
changelog.1.0.3: Fix: run pocketbase migrate up explicitly in start.sh so collection creation errors surface in logs; improve publish error messages to include HTTP status and field details.
changelog.1.0.4: Fix: bake relative PocketBase URL (/_pb) into SPA at build time; eliminate runtime sed substitution that caused fetch() to throw status 0 when APP_DOMAIN was unset.
changelog.1.0.6: Fix: embed schedule source dropdown no longer requires a schedule to be loaded first; any published schedule can now be selected directly.
changelog.1.0.7: Fix: Load Published Schedule modal now fetches the schedule list on open instead of relying on the user menu load.
changelog.1.0.8: Fix: forward Keycloak JWT to PocketBase on every storage call (enables @request.auth.* collection rules); support Keycloak Organization Membership mapper for org_id claim; guard localStorage clear to only run when PocketBase schedule publishing is configured; fix loadPublishedScheduleById blocking legacy records with empty org_id.
changelog.1.0.9: Fix: extract org_id from organization attributes when 'Add organization attributes' is enabled on the Keycloak Organization Membership mapper; fix logout redirect to use registered /logged-out.html URI; prevent Not-authenticated crash and PocketBase 400 when Keycloak token is not yet available.
